prompt: Create a realistic snapshot of an elderly farmer standing in a field. His skin is weathered with visible wrinkles, pores, and sun damage, including some faded scars on his arms. He is calmly plowing the land while his dog sits on a nearby mound. The shooting style resembles a 35mm film photograph, using a 50mm lens, captured from a medium close-up perspective at eye level. Soft daylight, shallow depth of field, fine film grain, and natural color balance. The image should feel authentic and natural, showcasing real skin texture, worn materials, and everyday details. No beautification or over-editing.
